key_changes: Changed card extension validation from 'jobcard' to 'bop' (line 55)
Reformatted nested conditionals and async operations
Improved code readability with consistent spacing

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent use of TokioCommand with .await for shell operations
patterns_discovered.evidence: Multiple criterion execution blocks with output capture and logging

patterns_discovered.description: File extension checking to identify valid card bundles

gotchas_discovered.description: Extension validation changed from 'jobcard' to 'bop'. May affect compatibility with existing card bundles.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify all card creation and discovery logic uses consistent extension naming

gotchas_discovered.description: 232-line diff mostly whitespace; difficult to identify functional changes visually
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use git diff with --ignore-all-space to review actual logic changes separately

gotchas_discovered.description: Code includes note about stale working copies from concurrent jj ops requiring workspace healing
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure jj workspace update-stale runs before all AC checks

approach_outcome.summary: Executed make check (test + clippy + fmt) and addressed all compliance issues
key_accomplishments: Fixed all clippy formatting violations through standardized indentation
Updated card extension validation from 'jobcard' to 'bop'
Maintained all functional logic while improving code clarity

recommendations.recommendation: Audit all card creation logic to ensure '.bop' extension is used consistently
recommendations.rationale: Extension change in validation logic must be matched in creation logic to prevent card discovery failures

recommendations.recommendation: Document the card extension change in CONTRIBUTING or project docs
recommendations.rationale: Users and developers need to understand '.bop' is the canonical extension

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration test for card extension validation
recommendations.rationale: Prevent regression when card format changes occur

recommendations.recommendation: Consider automated formatting check in CI/CD pipeline
recommendations.rationale: Prevents future manual formatting passes from accumulating
